message:
✨ Add restart polling and progress UI for Helm self-upgrade (#2413)

After clicking "Upgrade to vX.Y.Z", the Deployment image is patched
and the pod restarts. Previously the user saw nothing — the request
either failed silently or the page went dead.

Now the hook enters a "restarting" state that:
- Shows a spinner with elapsed time ("Console is restarting... 12s")
- Polls /health every 3s until the new pod responds
- Auto-reloads the page once the backend is back
- Shows an error with manual refresh if the pod doesn't come back
  within 120s
- Handles the case where the trigger response itself is lost
  (connection dies mid-request) by detecting network errors and
  starting the poll anyway

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -98,7 +98,16 @@ export function UpdateSettings() { const oauthConfigured = isAuthenticated // Helm self-upgrade via Deployment image patch - const { isAvailable: selfUpgradeAvailable, triggerUpgrade: triggerSelfUpgrade, isTriggering: isSelfUpgrading, triggerError: selfUpgradeError } = useSelfUpgrade() + const { + isAvailable: selfUpgradeAvailable, + triggerUpgrade: triggerSelfUpgrade, + isTriggering: isSelfUpgrading, + triggerError: selfUpgradeError, + isRestarting: isSelfUpgradeRestarting, + restartComplete: selfUpgradeRestartComplete, + restartError: selfUpgradeRestartError, + restartElapsed: selfUpgradeRestartElapsed, + } = useSelfUpgrade() const CHANNEL_OPTIONS: { value: UpdateChannel; label: string; description: string; devOnly?: boolean }[] = [ { @@ -708,8 +717,42 @@ export function UpdateSettings() { )} + {/* Helm Self-Upgrade: Restarting overlay */} + {(isSelfUpgradeRestarting || selfUpgradeRestartComplete || selfUpgradeRestartError) && ( +

@@ -525,6 +525,11 @@
       "helmSelfUpgradeDesc": "Self-upgrade is enabled — you can upgrade directly from this page",
       "helmUpgradeNow": "Upgrade to {{tag}}",
       "helmUpgradeWarning": "This will restart the console pod. All users will briefly lose connection.",
